title: senna pilifera
intro: Senna pilifera, also known as country mallow or horse sage, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative and anti-inflammatory agent, due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Senna pilifera include its ability to relieve constipation, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Senna pilifera include teas, infusions, and dried root extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
